message:
fix(cli,extensions): preserve --help/--version error kinds through extension flag preprocessing, apply clippy and rustfmt fixes

CLI (cli.rs):
- Fix parse_with_extension_flags to propagate DisplayHelp and DisplayVersion
  clap errors immediately rather than falling through to extension-flag
  stripping, which previously swallowed help/version output when unknown
  flags were absent
- Add targeted test: parse_with_extension_flags_preserves_help_error

Extensions (extensions.rs):
- Promote OcoTunerState::from_config, snapshot, and rollback_to_safe_profile
  to const fn where the compiler allows it
- Replace manual a - lr*grad with lr.mul_add(-grad, a) to satisfy
  clippy::suboptimal_flops and improve floating-point accuracy
- Add #[allow(clippy::cast_sign_loss)] alongside existing cast_possible_truncation
  on the OCO recommended_batch_size conversion
- Add #[allow(clippy::option_if_let_else)] on hostcall_superinstruction_telemetry
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] on marshal() and set_budget_controller_config
- Rustfmt: reflow long if-let chain in JIT promotion dispatch, reorder imports

Trace JIT (hostcall_trace_jit.rs):
- Rustfmt only: reflow method signatures, chain expressions, struct literals,
  and import ordering to satisfy automated formatting checks; no logic changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
